description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in a professional football (soccer) uniform, featuring a short-sleeved jersey and matching shorts with a distinctive vertical split design. The uniform is adorned with visible sponsor logos and a club crest, indicating affiliation with Galatasaray S.K., a well-known Turkish football club. He is wearing athletic socks that reach just below the knee and a pair of modern sports cleats. His arms are slightly extended outward, and he has a white wristband on his right wrist. The figure has a short, neatly styled haircut and a clean-shaven face, with a fit and athletic build typical of a football player. The overall appearance is that of a sportsman ready for play, with no visible carried objects or accessories beyond the uniform and footwear.
description: An adult male in a professional football uniform with sponsor logos, athletic socks, and sports cleats, posed with arms slightly outstretched. The figure has a fit build and a short, neat hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full football uniform, club crest, sponsor logos, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the vertical split of the uniform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jersey with a sponsor logo and the back of the shorts and socks.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and the uniform's side details.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic football jersey and shorts with knee-high athletic socks and a wristband
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
